# UI Assets

Store future UI polish assets here.

Planned UI polish:

- Dialogue box texture
- Title card animation assets
- Menu selection sounds or UI indicators
- Fade transition overlays
- Screen shake presets or data

Keep the style close to Nintendo DS-era RPG menus and dialogue boxes.

Example names:

- `dialogue-box-texture.png`
- `title-card-frame.png`
- `menu-cursor.png`
- `fade-mask.png`
